intent: Model stays a thin coordinator; per-view state lives in view structs, not here (Tenets 1 & 2).
Rows are typed structs; never flatten to arrays accessed by magic integer indices like ra[3] (Tenet 4).
No growth of central per-view branching on view identity; views own behavior via the View interface (Tenet 2).
Stay within declared scope: dispatch only the approved capabilities (Tenet 3 — fight scope creep, e.g. GPU-dashboard -> k9s-clone).
